description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a dark, likely glass body and a blue cap. The bottle features a rectangular label on its front, which appears to have white or light-colored text and design elements, giving it a premium or artisanal appearance. The neck of the bottle is long and tapers smoothly into the body, which is cylindrical and uniform in diameter. The cap is a distinct, vibrant blue, contrasting with the otherwise dark bottle. The label is the only visible branding or text, and it is centered on the front of the bottle. The surface of the bottle appears smooth and glossy, typical of glass bottles used for beverages such as wine or spirits.
description: A tall, dark glass bottle with a blue cap and a rectangular label on the front, featuring a smooth and glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the label with visible text and the blue cap.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the label partially visible and the blue cap prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view with no label visible, showing the plain dark body and blue cap.
description_view_3: Side view with the edge of the label just visible and the blue cap on top.
attribute_label_or_branding: A rectangular label with white or light text and design, centered on the front of the bottle.
